title: [trustless://eil] Yoav Weiss - Making Ethereum Feel Like One Chain Again
description:
Yoav Weiss of the Ethereum Foundation unveils EIL's design and explains how Ethereum can feel like one chain again without compromising on its core values

Talk given during day 1 of the trustless:// conference at Devconnect Argentina 2025

https://trustlessconference.com
